name: grep
description: Search file contents using ripgrep. Use this to find function/class/variable definitions, imports, error messages, TODO comments, or any text pattern in code. For searching by filename patterns instead, use glob. For viewing directory structure, use tree.

pattern.description: Search pattern (regex by default, use --literal for exact match)

type.description: File type filter (e.g., go, py, ts, js) - repeatable

literal.description: Treat pattern as literal text, not regex

max.description: Maximum number of results to return

context.description: Number of context lines to show around each match

name: glob
description: Search filenames using fd. Use this to find files by name or extension pattern (e.g., *.go, *_test.go, config files). For searching file contents instead, use grep. For viewing directory structure, use tree.

type.description: Type filter: f=files only, d=directories only

max.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: tree
description: Display directory structure using tree command. Use this to understand project layout, explore unfamiliar codebases, or view the overall organization. For searching file contents, use grep. For finding specific files by name, use glob.

name: check
description: Verify dependencies (ripgrep, fd, tree) are installed and accessible. Run this before using other commands to ensure the required CLI tools are available.
